landing.title:
Track your workouts.
Measure your progress.
landing.subtitle: The fastest way to log your routines, sets and weights at the gym.

routines.title: My routines
routines.noRoutines: You don't have any routines yet
routines.noRoutinesDescription: Create your first routine to start training.
routines.dayCount: {count, plural, =0 {No days} one {1 day} other {# days}}
routines.noDays: Add a day to start building the routine.
routines.exercisesInDay: {count, plural, =0 {No exercises} one {1 exercise} other {# exercises}}
routines.deleteRoutineConfirmDescription: Its days and assigned exercises will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.
routines.deleteDayConfirmDescription: Exercises assigned to this day will be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

workout.noRoutineDays: You don't have any training days yet
workout.noRoutineDaysDescription: Create a routine with at least one day to start training.
workout.finishConfirmDescription: The workout will be saved with the sets logged so far.
workout.exitConfirmDescription: The workout hasn't been finished yet. If you leave now, today's progress won't be saved as completed.

dashboard.title: Home
dashboard.weeklyStreakUnit: {count, plural, =0 {0 weeks} one {1 week} other {# weeks}}
dashboard.noNextWorkout: Create a routine to see your next workout
dashboard.noWorkoutsYet: You haven't logged any workouts yet

history.title: History
history.noWorkoutsDescription: When you finish a workout it will show up here.
history.sets: {count, plural, =0 {0 sets} one {1 set} other {# sets}}

statistics.title: Statistics
statistics.subtitle: Track your personal records across every exercise

statistics.noData: No records yet for this exercise
